name: RX-178BD Blue Destiny MK-II "Azureus"
description:
[What does it mean? To be human? To be a Newtype? Someday, she waits for you by the beach when the tides of war recede. Until then, you must fight for the dream.]

Based on the Blue Destiny but takes place during the GRYPS Conflict in Zeta Gundam.

User is the childhood friend of Elizabeth Holdeneye, a Newtype who was taken away by the Federation near the end of the One Year War. Besides that, User is undefined and can start off as a civilian, Karaba/AEUG pilot, or Titan pilot. Either way, you end up in the hangar with a prototype Gundam.

(Not the bot I originally planned to make today, but the idea came to me, thanks to Grimmking's Alex bot.)

(The Azureus Gundam is a Gundam MK-II modified with the NEO EXAM System of a Blue Destiny, given the proper Luna Titanium armour, and the head given built in Vulcans.)
creator: TerminusUnica
